name: Spiced or Plain Butterhorns
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, yeast and 1 Tbsp sugar in a warm place until the yeast dissolves and the mixture foams.
2. Mix together nutmeg, flour, cinnamon, salt and margarine as you would for a pie crust. Add egg yolks and yeast mixture. Blend well to form a ball.
3. Divide dough into 4 parts. Roll each into an 8- or 10-inch circle on wax paper. Cut into eight to ten wedges.
4. Spread each piece with a mixture of egg white and 1/2 cup sugar, then sprinkle with nuts.
5. Roll from the wide end to the pointed end to form a horn.
6. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 375°F for 12-15 minutes until lightly browned.
7. To make frosting, combine ingredients and beat until fluffy. Frost when cooled.
8. If left unfrosted, dust with powdered sugar or leave plain. For non-spiced cookies, omit cinnamon and nutmeg.
